name: Shadow Funnel
category: Traffic / Advanced — Strategy (presence optimization, not a built funnel)
lengthClass: n/a — strategy / presence-optimization overlay (no linear page sequence)
buildableNote: Not a funnel the marketer builds page-by-page. It is the invisible research journey prospects take after exposure; you 'build' it by OWNING and optimizing the properties they land on.

goals: Ensure that when a prospect researches the brand/person/product after seeing an ad, every search result is an owned property with a clear opt-in and no dead ends.
Convert the large share of buyers who do NOT click the ad but instead Google the name later.
Dominate the branded SERP and review surfaces so the research journey funnels back into the value ladder.
keywords: what comes up when you search me
signals: Client runs ads but conversion attribution is murky — many buyers arrive via 'how did you hear about us: searched your name'.
Searching the brand returns third-party pages, dead ends, or nothing the brand controls.
Client has a Funnel Hub or social profiles that are not optimized as capture points.
antiSignals: No brand awareness / no ad traffic yet — there is no shadow to capture; build front-end traffic first.

pageStructure.purpose: Be the #1 organic result for the brand name; the central capture point for all shadow traffic.
elements: Optimized title/meta for brand + founder name

pageStructure.purpose: Rank for branded searches and route profile visitors to the Hub / a lead funnel.
elements: Consistent handle, bio one-liner, and profile imagery across platforms
Bio link -> lead magnet or Hub
Pinned post/story highlight that pre-frames the core offer

pageStructure.purpose: Make sure third-party results (Google Business, YouTube, podcasts, press) reinforce trust and link back to owned properties.
elements: Authority placements (podcast guesting, press) pointing to the Hub
Branded YouTube channel optimized for name search

pageStructure.purpose: Occupy the first page of search for the brand, founder, product, and '[brand] reviews/scam' queries.
elements: Hub + blog content targeting brand-name and '[brand] review' queries
FAQ / about content answering common research questions
No dead-end pages — every owned result has an opt-in

pageStructure.purpose: Re-present the front-end offer to people who researched but did not opt in.
elements: Pixels on Hub + all owned properties
Retargeting ad audiences segmented by page visited
Bridge ad creative back to the #1 front-end funnel

copyFramework.primaryPersona: Russell Brunson — Traffic Secrets persona (The Traffic Strategist): Dream 100, Hook-Story-Offer for native content, the Funnel Hub + Shadow Funnel capture doctrine.
supportingPersonas: Donald Miller — StoryBrand persona (The Brand Clarifier): the SB7 framework — (1) a Character who (2) has a Problem, (3) meets a Guide, (4) who gives them a Plan, (5) and calls them to Action, (6) that ends in Success and (7) helps them avoid Failure — plus the one-liner and the grunt test.

Russell Brunson — Expert Secrets persona (The Attractive Character / Expert): Epiphany Bridge story script, the Big Domino, false-belief patterns (vehicle/internal/external), Perfect Webinar, The Stack and Close, Hook-Story-Offer.
scripts: One consistent StoryBrand one-liner used as the bio/meta description across EVERY owned property (consistency is the whole game).
Attractive Character bio (Expert Secrets) reused on each profile so the researcher meets the same person everywhere.
Hook-Story-Offer retargeting ad copy to recapture researchers who didn't opt in.
copyFramework.notes: There is no new sales copy to write here — the work is consistency and coverage. Audit every place the brand name appears and make sure the message, one-liner, and opt-in path are identical and unbroken.

pages: No new GHL pages of its own — this overlays the Funnel Hub (built separately) plus external profiles.
In GHL, ensure the Hub Website SEO titles/meta target brand + founder name.
skill44Widgets: Skill 44 Form widget reused as the universal opt-in destination linked from every external bio.
Skill 44 review-request form/workflow to push happy customers to Google reviews.
automations: Workflow: 'How did you hear about us = searched name' tag -> attribute to shadow funnel for reporting.
Retargeting audience sync from Hub pixel -> recapture ad set.
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 does not create a standalone funnel here; it configures the Hub's SEO + a single canonical opt-in (Skill 44 form) that every owned property links to. Deliverable is an audit + a presence map, not a page build.

metrics: Share of first-page branded-search results that are owned
